name: North Jakarta Intercultural School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Boulevard Bukit Gading Raya, Kelapa Gading, Jakarta Utara 14240, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Kelapa Gading's international option. American/IB curriculum, serves the North Jakarta expat community. Mid-range fees.
paragraphs: Kelapa Gading's international option. American/IB curriculum, serves the North Jakarta expat community. Mid-range fees.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$6.1K – US$16K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Kelapa Gading campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Performing arts spaces.
